title: Android OS
html: Stub. Google's mobile OS. Per the Felt et al. survey, almost all 18 Android malware samples (2009-2011) appeared in 2011 — the malware ecosystem caught up fast. First mentioned in 2025 06 01 mobile malware survey felt.

related.label: Mobile malware survey — credential theft, premium SMS, 2FA bypass, IMEI defenses
Mobile malware survey (Felt et al.) — methodology, data set, novelty/amusement, selling user info
